mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_security_history (user_id, actor_user_id, event_type, event_stage, input_identifier, target_email, success, fail_reason, detail_message, request_id, flow_trace_id, ip_address, user_agent) VALUES (#{userId}, #{actorUserId}, #{eventType}, #{eventStage}, #{inputIdentifier}, #{targetEmail}, #{success}, #{failReason}, #{detailMessage}, #{requestId}, #{flowTraceId}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent})

where.if: AND (input_identifier LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR target_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR fail_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ip_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR request_id = #{keyword} OR flow_trace_id = #{keyword})

mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, actor_user_id, event_type, event_stage, input_identifier, target_email, success, fail_reason, detail_message, request_id, flow_trace_id, ip_address, user_agent, occurred_at FROM user_security_history
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
